plugins.name: 3gpp-reader
plugins.description: Fetch and analyze 3GPP specs from ETSI to extract protocol header formats, field definitions, and bit layouts

plugins.name: rfc-reader
plugins.description: Fetch and analyze RFC documents to extract protocol header formats, field definitions, and bit layouts

plugins.name: copilot
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to GitHub Copilot CLI as a sub-agent

plugins.name: kernel-patch-review
plugins.description: Review Linux kernel patches against submitting-patches and coding-style guidelines using parallel sub-agents

plugins.name: iproute2-patch-review
plugins.description: Review iproute2 patches using the upstream masoncl/review-prompts/iproute checklist (the same prompt netdev maintainers run manually).

plugins.name: netdev-patch-review
plugins.description: Review Linux kernel networking patches (net/, drivers/net/, skb_*, sockets, including SRv6/seg6) using the upstream masoncl/review-prompts/kernel checklist with the networking subsystem context auto-loaded.

plugins.name: claude-ipc
plugins.description: Lightweight IPC between Claude Code instances via a shared JSONL message file. SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks auto-register each session in a peers list (~/.claude/claude-ipc-peers.jsonl by default; follows message_file when overridden via /claude-ipc:config). Skills: config, send, recv, peers.
